mano_cua.result_summary: 编辑器始终处于只读模式，mano-cua 在 62 步内反复尝试点击 Read Only 按钮、双击编辑区、使用键盘快捷键等方式均无法在编辑器中输入文本，因此无法创建待办列表项来测试 checkbox 勾选功能。进程因超时被 SIGKILL 终止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Clicking Update value didn't change the content either. The editor still shows Welcome and the example text. The editor at localhost:8080 appears to be in read-only mode.
